is_confirmation_required.description: Whether the change needs to be confirmed by the user by clicking the link in the confirmation email that was sent to the new address.

code.description: A specific error code for the type of error.

description.description: A human-readable message explaining the error.

reason.example: The task with ID '987654' does not exist.

user_id.description: ID of the user who triggered the task.

role.description: Determines whether permission is a role permission

user_sensor_permission.description: Determines whether permission is a user - sensor permission

info.description:
This is the documentation for the HTTP API provided by KIWI.KI GmbH for remote unlocking and administration of doors.
This API can be used for integration into existing systems and for application development.
info.title: The KIWI API

get.description:
An existing address indicates that this building is already KIWI equipped.
Session user needs to hold a permission to view the information regarding the sensor.

parameters.description: A street name
parameters.name: street

parameters.description: Building number
parameters.name: number

parameters.description: Postal code (Postleitzahl)
parameters.name: postal_code

get.summary: Find an address in KIWI database

post.summary: Assign a custom name to a sensor (friendly name)

get.summary: Get an organization sensor's custom attributes data

post.summary: Edit an organization sensor's attribute (one or multiple)

get.summary: Get a list of organization's custom attributes

post.summary: Edit an organization's custom attribute label

get.summary: Get a list of organization's custom fields
Get a list of the user's custom fields

post.description:
Creates a Permission for list of users (by their emails) and list of
sensors (by their IDs)

begins.description: Start date of the permission without timezone offset. Europe/Berlin timezone is assumed.

ends.description: Expiration date of the permission without timezone offset. Europe/Berlin timezone is assumed.

sensors.description: IDs of sensors that the permission should be granted for.

timeofday_begins.description: Start time of the permission on each day. Europe/Berlin timezone is assumed.

timeofday_ends.description: End time of the permission on each day. Europe/Berlin timezone is assumed.

users.description: Usernames/emails of users that the permission should be granted to.

weekdays.description: Weekdays on which the permission should be active.

post.summary: Create a new user - sensor permission

parameters.description: ID of the permission that should be deleted.
parameters.name: permission_id

parameters.description: ID of the permission that should be edited.
parameters.name: permission_id

begins.description: Start date of the permission without timezone offset. Europe/Berlin timezone is assumed.

ends.description: Expiration date of the permission without timezone offset. Europe/Berlin timezone is assumed.

timeofday_begins.description: Start time of the permission on each day. Europe/Berlin timezone is assumed.

timeofday_ends.description: End time of the permission on each day. Europe/Berlin timezone is assumed.

weekdays.description: Weekdays on which the permission should be active.

get.description:
Sensors can be filtered by various criteria.
Only sensors visible assigned permission system are returned.

parameters.description: Latitude (coordinate) in radians
parameters.name: lat

parameters.description: Longitude (coordinate) in radians
parameters.name: lng

parameters.description: Maximal distance from specified coordinates in kilometers
parameters.name: max_distance

parameters.description: Match on `specifier` sensor property
parameters.name: specifier

parameters.description: Street name of sensor's address
parameters.name: street

parameters.description: City where sensor is located
parameters.name: city

parameters.description: Province (Land) of sensor's address
parameters.name: state

parameters.description: Postal code (Postleitzahl) of sensor's address
parameters.name: postal_code

parameters.description: Require at least permission level X that user has over a sensor
parameters.name: permission

parameters.description: Maximal count of sensor in result list
parameters.name: page_size

parameters.description: Number of page in paginated results
parameters.name: page_number

parameters.description: Field to sort results by
parameters.name: sort_by

parameters.description: Direction of sorting results
parameters.name: order_by

parameters.description: Fuzzy case-insensitive search through `specifier`, `street`, `postal_code` and `city` at once.
parameters.name: search

get.summary: Get a list of visible sensors

post.description:
Allows to run one of predefined actions on a door sensor.
The most useful one is to open a door (``open``).

**Note**: sending a command to a sensor doesn't guarantee it's going to reach the target device (best effort).

200.description: Successfully sent out action command addressed to a sensor

503.description: Failed to send a command to the sensor

post.summary: Send a command to a sensor

get.description: Get the list of permissions for a certain sensor.

parameters.description: Filter by date time range. Permissions that overlap with the specified timespan (inclusive) will be included in the result (see `ends` parameter). Timezone needs to be specified.
parameters.name: begins

parameters.description: Filter by date time range. Permissions that overlap with the specified timespan (inclusive) will be included in the result (see `begins` parameter). Timezone needs to be specified.
parameters.name: ends

parameters.description: Filter by timing state of a permission.
parameters.name: timing_state

parameters.description: Filter by permission type.
parameters.name: granted

parameters.description: Filter by username/email of the user that granted a permission.
parameters.name: granted_by

parameters.description: Filter by username/email of the user that a permission has been granted.
parameters.name: username

parameters.description: Filter by forename of the user that a permission has been granted.
parameters.name: name

parameters.description: Filter by last name of the user that a permission has been granted.
parameters.name: lastname

parameters.description:
Filter by segment of the user that a permission has been granted.
  * `00` - KIWI employee
  * `05` - KIWI electrician
  * `10` - Resident
  * `15` - Resident (special)
  * `20` - Small business employee
  * `25` - Small business employee (special)
  * `30` - Employee
  * `35` - Employee (special)
  * `40` - Service provider
  * `45` - Service provider (special)
  * `50` - Partner
  * `55` - Partner (special)
parameters.name: segment_id

parameters.description: Maximal number of items per page.
parameters.name: page_size

parameters.description: Number of page in paginated results.
parameters.name: page_number

parameters.description: Field to sort results by.
parameters.name: sort_by

parameters.description: Direction of sorting results.
parameters.name: order_by

delete.description: This effectively logs an user out.

post.description:
Establish an authenticated user session.
Before most API requests can be made, a login session must be started by providing a valid username and password. A **session key** will then be given back from the API, which can be used for authentication on further API requests.

get.summary: Get information about the status of a task

delete.description: You can only remove the email address of offline users managed by the session user's organization.

put.description: You can only change the email address of the session user or offline users managed by the session user's organization.

password.description: The current user's password. Required if a user is changing their own email.

200.description: Email address was changed or the change process was started successfully

post.description:
If tenants are moved out of an apartment, they will lose all permissions granted by the apartment managers. Also, the user will no longer be managed by the organisation.
If the user is an offline user, they will be deleted.

parameters.description: ID of the users that should be moved out.
parameters.name: user_id

200.description: Successfully moved tenant out of the organization

post.summary: Move tenant out of an organization
